title: Quotient Quorum: Maximizing Inequivalent Words modulo a Rewriting Congruence
strategies: trivial: dump every short word (length <= 3) and hope they are distinct classes
greedy trap: enumerate words and de-duplicate by raw string equality, taking the Nmax shortlex-first distinct words -- normalization then collapses many into one class
strong: reduce every word to its forward normal form under the given rules and keep one representative per normal form (recognizes the confluent part of the congruence)
optimal (headroom): Knuth-Bendix complete / close the congruence over all bounded words, so divergent critical pairs are merged and exactly one representative per true class is emitted
